title: Constable Studer
writer: Horst Budjuhn, Friedrich Glauser, Kurt Guggenheim
actors: Heinrich Gretler, Adolf Manz, Bertha Danegger
plot: In the village of Gerzenstein, the pre-trial detainee Erwin Schlumpf wants to commit suicide. He is accused of having murdered the merchant Wendolin Witschi. Sergeant Jakob Studer from the Cantonal police can save Schlumpf at the ...
